sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: Contracts = floor(Equity / (Biggest Loss / -optimal_f)) + 1. Requires optimal_f parameter (e.g., 0.4, 0.50) and absolute value of biggest historical loss. Recalculated daily after equity updates.

source_rule_text: Position size is calculated by dividing remaining equity by the ratio of biggest historical loss to optimal f, rounding down to integer and adding 1
